title: Fix simplify cron to use inject

log.context: Fix simplify cron to use inject

Done. Here's the summary:

- `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/simplify_act.py` was gutted from 280 lines down to 28. All file-scanning, subprocess/Claude CLI, and Discord posting logic was removed.
- The activity now just POSTs `{"content": "[simplify]", ...}` to the inject endpoint at `127.0.0.1:9876/inject` and returns `"injected [simplify]"`.
- Commit `0a1beda` pushed to `bigclungus/temporal-workflows` on master.
- `temporal-worker.service` restarted and is **active**.
